human.who: A nurse or front desk coordinator, probably underpaid, handling 40+ patients a day
human.hardest_moment: A patient calls asking about their appointment and she can't find the record fast enough
human.relief_moment: Everything she needs is on one screen without scrolling
human.early_morning: Pulling up yesterday's no-shows before the doctor arrives

decisions.lead_with: Today's appointments and alerts — not a login screen
decisions.most_important_feature: Quick patient lookup — she needs it in 3 seconds

navigation.first_tab_purpose: Today's appointments and alerts — not a login screen

dashboard_priority.lead_message: Everything she needs is on one screen without scrolling

human.who: One dedicated person running a meal program for elderly neighbors, often a volunteer or low-paid coordinator
human.hardest_moment: Realizing she doesn't know if Mrs. Hayes answered the door yesterday
human.relief_moment: Every client accounted for before she goes home
human.early_morning: Counting how many meals to prep before the kitchen starts

decisions.lead_with: Wellness alerts and today's delivery route
decisions.skip: Revenue tracking — this is a service not a business

human.who: A stylist who owns her own chair or small shop, doing everything alone
human.hardest_moment: A client shows up and she forgot about the appointment — another client is in the chair
human.relief_moment: Her phone buzzes 30 min before each client so she's never caught off guard
human.early_morning: Checking who's coming in today while drinking coffee

decisions.lead_with: Today's schedule — big, clear, impossible to miss
